message:
test(fcp-core): pin policy route-key dispatch through PolicyEngine (flywheel_connectors-kjs08)

Bead asks for PolicyRouter route-key derivation — fcp-core has no
type literally named PolicyRouter; the routing lives in
PolicyEngine::evaluate_invoke (policy.rs:2483) and check_pattern_lists
(policy.rs:2718). The "route key" is the (principal, connector_id,
capability_id) tuple, each dispatched to its own allow/deny pattern
list on ZonePolicyObject. PolicyPattern is the glob matcher.

Coverage:
- Field → pattern-list dispatch (principal -> principal_*, connector
  -> connector_*, capability -> capability_*) — a deny pattern in
  the wrong list MUST NOT trigger that dimension's reason
- Deny precedence over Allow within each dimension
- Empty allow-list = no constraint (NOT default-deny);
  capability_ceiling is the separate default-deny mechanism
- Non-empty allow-list MUST match — *NotAllowed reason fires
- Cross-dimension deny precedence: principal -> connector ->
  capability, all denies before any allow check
- PolicyPattern glob semantics dispatched through the engine: `*`,
  `?` (single ASCII), exact
- PolicyPattern JSON shape `{"pattern": <glob>}` + CBOR round-trip
- DecisionReasonCode label format pinned: `zone_policy.<dim>_<verb>`
  (dot between namespace and dimension, underscore inside suffix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
